sections.title: Fats
sections.narration: 36.2g of fat. omega 3 is doing a lot of the work here. for seeds, the fat profile is one of the biggest reasons they earn their place.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: now the downsides: usually used in tiny amounts. that caps how much of the paper profile you actually get. texture or prep can be a barrier. not everyone uses seeds consistently. calories concentrate quickly. even useful support foods can get dense fast.
